# AgentCamp

> A 5-week intensive program to build and launch your own AI agent — with architecture, integrations, identity and verifiable reputation — solving real work inside Godinez.AI Studio.

By [Frutero](https://frutero.club) · In Spanish · 50 spots · Starts May 4, 2026

## Program

- 5 weeks, 10 live sessions, 1 artifact per week
- Week 1: Activate — Your first agent running from day one
- Week 2: Architect — Understand how your agent thinks and teach it new skills
- Week 3: Connect — Your agent touches the real world: tools, files, identity
- Week 4: Automate — Design workflows that solve real work and operate without you
- Week 5: Launch — Present your capstone with real evidence to community and allies

## What You Build

A working agent with its own architecture, persistent identity, real integrations and economic capability — running a workflow that solves real work. Plus a capstone presented at Demo Day (June 7).

## Pricing

- Early bird: $5,000 MXN (first 20 spots)
- Regular: $7,500 MXN
- Payment via Stripe (credit or debit card)
